view.title: Validate explicit UC need #4
view.subtitle: Exploratory validation passed: The requirement for linking the Zoom meeting to calendar invites and emails is satisfied.

blocks.title: Uc Need Validate 4 completed
blocks.message: Exploratory validation passed: The requirement for linking the Zoom meeting to calendar invites and emails is satisfied.

items.label: Assessment
items.value: The evidence provided in the linked use case confirms that a unique Zoom meeting link is generated and included in the confirmation email, as well as added to both the therapist's and client's Google Calendar. This directly supports the requirement of having the link added to calendar invites and emails, fulfilling the expectation set in the exploratory step. The successful execution of the booking process and the subsequent actions validate that the requirement is indeed covered.
